sans.value: Inter, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Oxygen, Ubuntu, Cantarell, 'Fira Sans', 'Droid Sans', 'Helvetica Neue', sans-serif
sans.usage: Global application font stack for product UI, tables, forms, and panels.

typeScale.name: caption

fontWeight.usage: Use 500 for dense UI labels, 600 for titles and active navigation.
